settings.heading: RCX PRO , une famille qui grandit chaque jour
settings.review_text_1: “Incroyable, elle passe vraiment partout, je drif comme un fou”
settings.review_text_2: “Franchement impressionné par la vitesse, elle part comme une fusée.”
settings.review_text_3: “Je valide 100% le RCX PRO. Super buggy très résistant et facile à contrôler.”
settings.review_text_4: “Le meilleure RC du marché, la puissance, le prix, la résistance tout y est !”

settings.custom_liquid: {%- liquid assign current_locale = request.locale.iso_code | downcase case current_locale when 'en' assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_en | default: 'and' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_en | default: 'people bought' when 'es' assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_es | default: 'y' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_es | default: 'personas compraron' when 'de' assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_de | default: 'und' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_de | default: 'Personen haben gekauft' when 'nl' assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_nl | default: 'en' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_nl | default: 'mensen hebben gekocht' when 'sv' assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_sv | default: 'och' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_sv | default: 'personer köpte' else assign text_prefix = section.settings.text_fr | default: 'et' assign text_suffix = section.settings.suffix_fr | default: 'personnes ont acheté' endcase -%} {{ section.settings.name | default: 'Lola' }} {{ text_prefix }} {{ section.settings.count | default: '15 758' }} {{ text_suffix }}
